name: Ruqayya bint Ali
title: Wife of Muslim ibn Aqeel
shortDescription: The daughter of Amir al-Mu'minin (AS) and wife of Muslim ibn Aqeel who was bereaved by both her husband's and her brother's martyrdom.
fullStory:
Ruqayya bint Ali was one of the prominent daughters of Amir al-Mu'minin (AS) who had married her brave cousin, Muslim ibn Aqeel (the ambassador of Imam Hussain).

When Muslim ibn Aqeel went to Kufa to take allegiance from the people, Ruqayya stayed in Imam Hussain's (AS) caravan with her children, waiting for news of her husband. However, at the 'Zubala' station, the painful news of Muslim's martyrdom and the Kufans' disloyalty reached the caravan.

While still wearing mourning clothes for her devoted husband, on the day of Ashura, Ruqayya witnessed the martyrdom of her beloved brother, Imam Hussain (AS), and other dear ones of Bani Hashem.

Bearing the grief of both her husband and her brother, she nursed Muslim's orphaned children and other young children of the caravan with exemplary perseverance during captivity, becoming a symbol of patience in the face of the heaviest tragedies.
quote: (Her wailing for her loved ones:) Oh my Muslim!... Oh my brother!...
